summary: AIR-DROW Hand Input Reliability: deliberate open-hand pinch drawing, safe tracking-loss recovery, a shorter live-guide hold and compact mobile scan feedback.
features: Requires a stable open hand before a pinch can arm a new drawing stroke.
Requires a small deliberate movement after pinch before ink is committed, preventing accidental dots and lines.
Pauses a stroke during a short tracking interruption and requires a re-pinch before it can continue.
Fades a held hand guide after 260 ms and keeps the scanner small on mobile.
Retains local MediaPipe, protected physical-only export/save/clear and current legacy WebKit compatibility.

privacy.drawings: Your drawing data and preferences stay on your device unless you explicitly export, share, or use an optional AI creation action.
privacy.camera: Camera permission is requested only after you choose to open the camera. Camera video is not saved by AIR-DROW.
privacy.handTracking: The deployed app uses the local same-origin hand model and runtime. It does not download a hand model while you draw.
privacy.checks: Readiness checks and diagnostics read browser/app state only. They do not open the camera, trigger a download, upload a report, or include camera frames, hand landmarks, drawing points, project titles, or API URLs.

buildPolicy.runtimeNetwork: The deployed browser loads the hand runtime and model from the same AIR-DROW site.
buildPolicy.delivery: The update package preserves the existing local Kurdish UI font during Termux replacement; the build validates source and local hand assets before publishing.
